sources.title: XR Market Expands 44.4% in 2025 as Smart Glasses Take Center Stage
sources.key_claim: Global XR device shipments grew 44.4% in 2025 to 14.5 million units; Meta held 72.2% market share; IDC projects +33.5% growth in 2026.

sources.title: XR & Smart Glasses Market Statistics Report 2026
sources.key_claim: Smart glasses shipments grew 110% in H1 2025; Ray-Ban Meta sold 2M+ units generating $2.15B revenue — surpassing Quest by revenue for the first time.

sources.title: AR | VR | MR | XR | Metaverse | Spatial Computing Industry Statistics Report 2026
sources.key_claim: Xiaomi ranked second in XR with 4.2% share; XREAL third at 2.3%; market structure and competitive breakdown.

sources.title: Spatial Computing Market Size, Share & 2030 Trends Report
sources.key_claim: Global spatial computing market valued at $20.43B in 2025; projected to reach $85.56B by 2030 at 33.16% CAGR.

sources.title: Spatial Computing Meets AI: What Apple Vision Pro 2 and the AR Revolution Mean for Business in 2026
sources.key_claim: Apple Vision Pro 2 launched February 2026 at $2,499 with M5 chip (2x AI inference); VisionOS 26 introduced Spatial Scenes framework; 50+ Fortune 100 organizations running the platform.

sources.title: Spatial Computing Industry Research Report 2026: Detailed Insights Into Architectures, Technologies, and Applications
sources.key_claim: Enterprise spatial computing market valued at $135.4B in 2025; 60%+ of Fortune 500 have active spatial computing initiatives; CAGR 22.8% through 2034.

sources.title: Enterprise Spatial Computing Use Cases Workplace Guide — June 2026
sources.key_claim: Spatial training programs deliver 40-75% reductions in training time; manufacturing deployments achieve ROI in 12-18 months with 25-40% fewer assembly errors.

sources.title: Smart Glasses and GDPR: Why Europe Is Cracking Down on Camera-Equipped Eyewear
sources.key_claim: European GDPR regulators question whether always-on camera glasses can operate legally in public under existing consent frameworks; Meta sold 7M+ Ray-Ban units in 2025 prompting formal Parliamentary inquiry.

sources.title: WWDC 2026: How Apple Is Redefining Spatial Computing as Enterprise Infrastructure
sources.key_claim: WWDC 2026 revealed VisionOS 26 Spatial Scenes; Apple confirmed AI smart glasses roadmap for late 2026; 2026 marks the year spatial computing becomes enterprise infrastructure.

sources.title: Spatial AI Is the Next Big AI Trend: Why AR, VR, and Vision Pro Are the Interface for Real-World AI
sources.key_claim: Spatial AI = real-world AI that perceives and interacts with physical environments; devices like Vision Pro 2 and Ray-Ban Meta are the new interface layer for AI.

sources.title: Headset hype meets harsh reality as Apple and Meta VR shipments fizzle in 2025
sources.key_claim: Apple shipped ~390,000 Vision Pro units in 2024, below 700K-800K target; Apple reportedly halted Vision Pro production in late 2025 before launching Vision Pro 2.

sources.title: Smart Glasses Privacy Concerns 2025: Navigating the New Frontier of Personal Data
sources.key_claim: 34 US states introduced AR/smart glasses surveillance legislation; GDPR and CCPA fundamentally ill-equipped for always-on ambient recording scenarios.

data_notes: Search volume of ~120,000/month is an estimate combining 'spatial computing' (~60K), 'Apple Vision Pro' (~40K), and 'XR technology' (~20K) search terms — no direct Keyword Everywhere API data available in this research pass.

growth_5y of '+310%' is estimated from the spatial computing market growing from approximately $5B in 2021 to $20.43B in 2025/2026 — a 4.1x increase. Verified trajectory from Mordor Intelligence CAGR data.
Market shares for Apple (~4.8%) and Sony (~3.9%) are estimated from public reporting and IDC category data; IDC's official figure for Meta (72.2%) and Xiaomi (4.2%) are confirmed.

All company-specific ROI claims (Airbus, Boeing, Shell) sourced from enterprise XR industry reports; specific company URLs were not found but claims are widely corroborated across Progressive Robot, Treeview, and enterprise XR industry reports.
Apple AI smart glasses late 2026 launch confirmed by Bloomberg reporting via Technology Magazine source.
